label: Parametric memory

node.label: Parametric memory
node.definition: Knowledge is encoded implicitly in learned parameters and recalled through model computation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Parametric memory is to connect Large-scale pretraining, Transformers to downstream capabilities including Semantic memory, Knowledge editing & memory consolidation.
examples: substrate for Knowledge editing & memory consolidation
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Large-scale pretraining, Transformers.

dependencies.rationale: Parametric memory uses Large-scale pretraining as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Parametric memory uses Transformers as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Parametric memory stores, selects, or obtains information through Embeddings & distributed representations.
